LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S (AMENDED) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. ON THE ISSUE OF DANGEROUS CONDITION, DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN. THE ACCIDENT HISTORY DATA IS NOT PROBATIVE BECAUSE OF CHANGES TO THE INTERSECTION. THE RYAN DECLARATION ALSO RAISES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT THAT THE CONDITION IS DANGEROUS. ON THE ISSUE OF DESIGN IMMUNITY, IT APPEARS THAT THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO THE MOVEMENT OF VEHICLES WESTBOUND ACROSS POTRERO. SEE PLAINTIFF FACTS 30, 34-36, 45, 48, 50-52. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION IS OVERRULED AS TO EXPERT'S RELIANCE ON THE POLICE REPORT. THE REPORT ITSELF IS NOT ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
